Public Remarks: Charming 3-bedroom, 2-bath home in a quiet neighborhood close to downtown St. Pete. Updated kitchen and bathrooms. Large fenced backyard. Attached one-car garage. Pet-friendly (small dogs only). Walking distance to coffee shops and restaurants.
Directions: From I-275 south, take exit 23A toward St Pete Beach, head west on Central Ave, right on 18th St, right on Bayshore Terrace.
